title: Vendor in latest storage, image and runtime-tools
body:
Need to pull in the latest containers/storage and containers/image to fix lots of
issues.  Also want to update runtime-tools to take advantage of newer generate
code.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM and all happy green buttons.
Ok I am going to merge since this is required to move some of the other PRs forward, and it is all vendoring.

:pushpin: Commit 23236be has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
